flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Southern State Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (751 vs 967).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern State Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.8k → $10.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southern State Community College rose 53% between 2006 and 2009 (49.0% → 75.2%).
